name: Dorf the Dwarf
short_description: Dorf the dwarf is a puzzle game which replicates the classic game Zeek the Geek. You play as Dorf, a dwarf adventuer, who dares into the dungeons of Koganusân , ruins of a dwarf fortress, to loot treasures, while avoiding ghosts, elephants and deadly traps, and solving puzzles.
detailed_description:
In the year 1050, the dwarven kingdom Kinmelbil founded Koganusân under "The Smooth Points of Pride".
In the following years, it had become a strong fortress and flourish city.
Now, it lies in ruins, seems to be forgotten by time itself.
Many adventurers went there to find their fortunes, but only a few came back alive.
Some of them even became insane, repeating: "Monsters, elephants, ..."
Of course, none of those scared you, the great dwarven adventurer Dorf!
Now use your pick to carve a new chapter of history for this legendary dwarf fortress!

Dorf the dwarf is a puzzle game which replicates the classic game Zeek the Geek. You play as Dorf, a dwarf adventuer, who dares into the dungeons of Koganusân , ruins of a dwarf fortress, to loot treasures, while avoiding ghosts, elephants and deadly traps, and solving puzzles. It provides more than 200 puzzles, from easy to difficult, for you to solve. It also adds some role playing elements and hidden treasures, but most solutions of the puzzles are kept unchanged.
